In crate cargo_nano_ros

cargo_nano_ros

Module cache 

Source
Expand description

Caching system for ROS 2 bindings generation

This module provides SHA256-based caching to avoid regenerating bindings when interface files haven’t changed.

Structs§

Cache
Cache for ROS 2 bindings
CacheEntry
Cache entry for a single package

Constants§

CACHE_FILE_NAME
Cache file name

Functions§

calculate_package_checksum
Calculate SHA256 checksum of a directory of interface files
